sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7540" key="a)nasthri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναστηρίζω</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 1</tns> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ξα,</foreign> <sense id="n7540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">set up firmly,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.321</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
